name: IMDb
description: The world's most authoritative source for movie, TV, and celebrity info. Ratings, trailers, cast lists, and box office data for millions of titles.

name: Letterboxd
description: Social film diary and review platform. Log every movie you watch, write reviews, make lists, and follow friends' tastes.

name: JustWatch
description: Streaming guide that tells you exactly where to watch any movie or show — Netflix, Prime, Disney+, and more — all in one search.

name: Rotten Tomatoes
description: Aggregated critic and audience scores for movies and TV. The Tomatometer is the industry-standard freshness rating.

name: Metacritic
description: Weighted Metascore aggregator for movies, TV, games, and music. Combines top critic reviews into a single authoritative score.

name: Trakt
description: Automatically track every movie and TV episode you watch. Syncs with Plex, Kodi, and Emby. Great for stats and recommendations.

name: FilmFreeway
description: The leading platform for film festival submissions worldwide. Browse thousands of festivals and submit your short or feature film.

name: The Movie DB
description: Community-built movie and TV database. Free API access for developers, extensive metadata, and beautiful poster artwork collections.

name: Plex
description: Stream your personal media library on any device. Also includes free ad-supported movies, TV, and live news.

name: Stremio
description: One app to organise all your streaming sources. Add-ons give you access to a huge range of content in one interface.

name: Tubi
description: 100% free ad-supported movie and TV streaming with thousands of titles. No subscription or credit card required.

name: 123Movies Alternative — SoapTV
description: Free streaming aggregator for movies and TV shows. Ad-supported with no account required.

name: Letterboxd Lists
description: Browse the most popular films on Letterboxd this week, curated by the community's ratings and watch activity.

name: FlixHQ
description: Free movie and TV streaming aggregator with a large catalogue and minimal sign-up friction.

name: Vudu
description: Buy or rent digital movies with no subscription needed. Also has a free ad-supported library.

name: Letterboxd Year in Review
description: See the most-watched, most-loved films of the year as tracked by the Letterboxd community.

name: Moviefone
description: Movie showtimes, trailers, and release date tracking for theatrical and streaming releases.
